_README: Brand config for Mustang Creek Community Church — first instance of the Church Website Engine. Sampled from their live site (mustangcreek.org) + logo 2026-06-28. This doubles as the engine's church-template reference.

colors._core_note: Gold #F4A81C (the cross / primary accent) on a near-black canvas #0C0D11 — matches their existing dark+gold site. White warm ink. One accent (gold) rationed; the CTA color.

fonts._note: Contemporary-worship: bold modern display + warm readable body. Distinct from TDD (Anton) + Heather (Fraunces).

logo._note: Their real gold-cross logo (downloaded from Wix). Gold on transparent — sits on the dark canvas perfectly.

do: lead with welcome + a clear Plan-a-Visit path
warm worship imagery (swap in their real photos)
dont: no scattered multi-accent tiles (their current site's weak spot)
no invented beliefs/staff/mission — flag what's missing
notes: Forney, TX · Sun 9 & 11am, Wed 7pm · Lead Pastors Robert & Judy Kennedy · Giving: Pushpay + Zelle (give@mustangcreek.org). MISSING (ask Charles/church): official mission statement, full beliefs/statement-of-faith text, some ministry detail copy (Real Women/Men/Young Adults/Camp Creek/Growth Track), whether a newsletter/prayer-request form exists. STACK gate: capture (connect/newsletter) is the pillar their current site is missing — added here.
